title: Charlemagne becomes king of Franks
fact: Charlemagne was King of the Franks from 768, King of the Lombards from 774, and Emperor of what is now known as the Carolingian Empire from 800.

title: Clovis I becomes king of Franks
fact: Clovis I was the first Frankish king to unite the Franks, changing the form of leadership from a group of petty kings to rule by a single king, and ensuring that the kingship was passed down to his heirs.

title: Pepin the Short becomes king of Franks
fact: Pepin the Short was King of the Franks from 751 until his death in 768.

title: Louis the Pious becomes king of Franks
fact: Louis the Pious, also called the Fair and the Debonaire, was King of the Franks and co-emperor with his father, Charlemagne, from 813.

title: Hugh Capet of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Hugh Capet was the King of the Franks from 987 to 996.

title: Louis VII of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Louis VII, was King of France from 1137 to 1180.

title: Louis VI of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Louis VI, called the Fat or the Fighter, reigned as King of the Franks from 1108 to 1137.

title: Robert II of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Robert II, called the Pious or the Wise, was King of the Franks from 996 to 1031, the second from the Capetian dynasty.

title: Henry I of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Henry I was King of the Franks from 1031 to 1060.

title: Philip I of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Philip I, called the Amorous, was King of the Franks from 1060 to 1108.

title: Childeric I becomes king of Franks
fact: Childeric I was a Frankish leader in the northern part of imperial Roman Gaul, and an ancestor of the Merovingian dynasty.

title: Childeric III becomes king of Franks
fact: Childeric III was King of the Franks from 743 until he was deposed in 751 by Pepin the Short.

title: Carloman I becomes king of Franks
fact: Carloman I, German Karlmann, Karlomann, was king of the Franks from 768 until his death in 771.

title: Lothair II of Lotharingia becomes king of Franks
fact: Lothair II was the king of Lotharingia from 855 until his death.

title: Theuderic III becomes king of Franks
fact: Theuderic III was King of the Franks in the 7th century.

title: Chilperic II becomes king of Franks
fact: Chilperic II was King of the Franks from 715 until his death.

title: Childebert III becomes king of Franks
fact: Childebert III, called the Just, was the son of Theuderic III and Chrothildis and sole king of the Franks (694–711).

title: Dagobert III becomes king of Franks
fact: Dagobert III was Merovingian king of the Franks (711–715).

title: Clovis IV becomes king of Franks
fact: Clovis IV was the king of the Franks from 690 or 691 until his death.

title: Dagobert II becomes king of Franks
fact: Dagobert II was a Merovingian king of the Franks, ruling in Austrasia from 675 or 676 until his death.

title: Childeric II becomes king of Franks
fact: Childeric II was King of the Franks in the 7th century.

title: Philip of France becomes king of Franks
fact: Philip was King of France from 1129 to 1131, co-ruling with his father, Louis VI.
